title: Upload
description: A downloadable file associated with a game. May be wharf-enabled (versioned channel-based distribution via butler).

id.description: Site-wide unique identifier generated by itch.io

storage.description: Storage backend: hosted (classic web upload), build (wharf/butler), or external

displayName.description: Human-friendly name set by the developer (e.g. Overland for Windows 64-bit)

size.description: Size in bytes; for wharf uploads this is the archive size

channelName.description: Name of the wharf channel for this upload; only set for wharf-enabled uploads

build.description: Latest build for this upload; only set for wharf-enabled uploads

buildId.description: ID of the latest build; only set for wharf-enabled uploads

preorder.description: Whether this upload is a pre-order placeholder

demo.description: Whether this upload is a free demo

platforms.description: Platforms this upload is compatible with

createdAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when this upload was created

updatedAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when this upload was last updated
